chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1787 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.7712/2018 2. For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, advocate for respondent Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General It is jointly stated that this matter is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Premier Systems (Pvt.) Ltd. and others vs. Federation of Pakistan (2018 PTD 861), therefore, it may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
